summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 4 new features added to Stanvard School ERP: (1) Edit student details + assign fees with discount/due date, (2) Enhanced Reports with filters, (3) Analytics dashboard with charts, (4) User management (edit/delete/reset-password). Backend: 63/63 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 12/13 flows tested successfully.
passed_tests: - PATCH /api/students/{id} updates personal details (father_name, phone, address)
- POST /api/fees/assignments creates assignment with custom_items, discount_percent=15, discount_amount=500, due_date
- PATCH /api/fees/assignments/{id} updates existing assignment (discount_percent=20, discount_amount=750, due_date)
- DELETE /api/fees/assignments/{id} removes assignment successfully
- GET /api/fees/student/{id}/dues returns new fields: total_expected, total_discount, balance, total_paid
- GET /api/reports/fee-status returns rows[] + summary with total_expected, total_paid, total_due, paid_count, partial_count, unpaid_count
- GET /api/reports/fee-status with class_id filter works (filters students by class)
- GET /api/reports/fee-status with status_filter=paid returns only paid students
- GET /api/reports/fee-status with min_due=1000 and max_due=10000 filters correctly
- GET /api/analytics returns full analytics object: year, total_received, total_expected, total_due, months (12 entries), by_mode, by_head, by_class, attendance
- GET /api/analytics?year=2024 changes data based on year parameter
- DELETE /api/users/{id} soft-deletes user (status=inactive)
- DELETE /api/users/{id} rejects deleting yourself (400)
- DELETE /api/users/{id} school_admin cannot delete super_admin (403)
- POST /api/users/{id}/reset-password updates password successfully
- Login with new password after reset succeeds
- RBAC: Parent cannot POST /api/fees/assignments (403)
- RBAC: Teacher cannot POST /api/fees/assignments (403)
- RBAC: Accountant cannot DELETE /api/users (403)
FRONTEND (12/13 flows - 92%):
- Student Detail page displays 4 balance cards: Total Expected, Total Paid, Discount, Balance Due
- Edit Student dialog opens with tabs (Basic/Family/Academic/Other), form prefilled with current data, can update father_name, phone, address
- Assign Fee dialog opens with mode selector (Use Fee Plan / Custom Items), discount % and due date fields visible
- Analytics page displays all 8 KPI cards: Received, Outstanding, Expected, Collection Rate, Total Students, Attendance Rate, Transactions, Discounts Given

- Analytics charts render: Monthly Collection (ComposedChart with Area+Bar), Payment Modes (Pie chart), Collection by Fee Head (horizontal bar), New Admissions (line chart), Class-wise Fee Status (stacked bar), Attendance Breakdown (pie chart)
- Analytics year selector (2024/2025/2026) changes data when selected
- Reports page Fee Collection tab loads with date filters and export buttons (PDF/CSV/XLSX)
- Reports Student Fee Status tab with filters: search (name/admission no.), class, section, status (paid/partial/unpaid), min due, max due - all filters work
- Fee status table displays all required columns: Student, Class, Guardian, Expected, Discount, Paid, Due, Due Date, Status with color-coded badges (green=paid, orange=partial, red=unpaid)
- Users page tab filters work: All, Admins, Accountants, Teachers, Parents
- Users page search filter works (filters by name/email)
- Edit user dialog opens with prefilled data (name, email, role, school), can update fields
- Reset Password dialog opens, can enter new password
- Sidebar shows Analytics link for school_admin role
